creator: dpolyg@gmail.com
text:
Hi Dmitry,

thank you for your response.
Your patch looks OK for me, but I am not sure what should I do 
from here because it is still a mystery for me how patches being 
introduced into git ports repository - who and how suppose to 
check and approve it and in what order...

I will be happy is your changes will appear after I type
'git pull' and if you want me to do something for that - 
please let me know.

Regards,
Denis.
